input.prompt: Forensic analytics command center with fraud network graph, risk score gauges, and document anomaly markers. Bloomberg-style dark interface, deep shadows, crimson glow, modern glassmorphism panels, data-first aesthetics.

Fraud detection diagram: filing timeline, risk score spike, network similarity clusters, and feature contribution bars. Dark forensic dossier aesthetic, crimson and amber glow, thin grid lines, no logos or text blocks.
Transparent-feel forensic overlay texture with radial scan arcs, evidence node lines, anomaly hotspots, and dossier grid marks for a dark fraud analytics UI. No logos, no text blocks.
